Product Details
Step Seals

Single-acting, O-Ring energized sealing elements for demanding reciprocating hydraulic applications.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Step Seals

A strong fit for rod or piston sealing positions where low friction and wear resistance must be balanced with sealing efficiency.

CHX Step Seals use PTFE-based sealing elements with elastomer energizers to support high sealing efficiency, low stick-slip behavior, and good wear resistance in reciprocating systems.

Single-Acting Sealing

Commonly used where a defined pressure direction and efficient sealing response are required.

Low Stick-Slip

Supports smoother startup and movement in hydraulic cylinder applications.

Closed Groove Installation

Suitable for standard hydraulic groove concepts and tandem sealing arrangements.
